nodes.label: Data Flow: Client -> FetchWrapper -> RouteHandler -> Service -> Repository -> Prisma -> PostgreSQL
nodes.rationale: Strict layering enforces separation of concerns and prevents direct DB access from the client side or route handlers

nodes.label: Repository Pattern (EntityAction)
nodes.rationale: Pure data access, no business logic — isolates Prisma queries for testability and reuse

nodes.label: Service Pattern (EntityService)
nodes.rationale: Business logic + auth verification in one place, calls repository, called by route handlers

nodes.label: Fetch Wrapper Pattern
nodes.rationale: Centralizes fetch calls to API routes; keeps components and hooks clean of raw fetch logic

nodes.label: React Query Hook Pattern
nodes.rationale: Encapsulates useQuery/useMutation with typed query keys; promotes reuse and cache coherence

nodes.label: Prisma Type Derivation Pattern
nodes.rationale: Use Prisma.EntityGetPayload instead of manually redefining types — ensures type-safety stays in sync with schema

nodes.label: Optimistic Updates Pattern
nodes.rationale: Update UI before server response for instant reactivity; rollback on error via onMutate/onError/onSettled lifecycle

nodes.label: State Extraction into Hooks Pattern
nodes.rationale: Avoid duplicating useState/handlers across components; extract to a dedicated hook and spread state onto children

nodes.label: Display Name Helpers (getDisplayName, getInitialName)
nodes.rationale: Centralizes name formatting logic to avoid inline recalculations

nodes.label: Prisma Transaction for Multi-table Ops
nodes.rationale: Use prisma.$transaction for atomicity across multiple table mutations

nodes.label: Lency Infrastructure
nodes.author: Timothée Van Den Bosch, Guerric Cochelin

nodes.label: Vercel PaaS Hosting
nodes.rationale: Chosen for native Next.js compatibility, automatic scaling, CDN, SSL, and zero-config CI/CD with GitHub

nodes.label: Neon.com PostgreSQL Serverless
nodes.rationale: Serverless PostgreSQL with usage-based pricing, isolated instances per environment, Prisma adapter support

nodes.label: CI/CD Pipeline (GitHub -> Vercel)
nodes.rationale: Push to main/staging triggers automatic build, Prisma migration, and deployment without manual intervention

nodes.label: Doppler Secrets Management
nodes.rationale: Centralized multi-environment secrets (lency/lency-staging/lency-development), injected at Vercel build time via native integration

nodes.label: Resend Transactional Email
nodes.rationale: Reliable transactional email via REST API with SPF/DKIM/DMARC support

nodes.label: Neon Serverless Adapter (@prisma/adapter-neon)
nodes.rationale: Required because Neon uses WebSocket in serverless mode instead of standard PostgreSQL TCP driver

nodes.label: Query Keys Hierarchy Pattern
nodes.rationale: Hierarchical array query keys enable targeted invalidation at different granularities (all, list, detail)

hyperedges.label: Full Data Flow Stack: FetchWrapper -> RouteHandler -> Service -> Repository -> Prisma
Auth OTP Flow: Better Auth + Resend + Email Templates + Auth Pages
Deployment Pipeline: GitHub -> Vercel -> Neon + Doppler
React Query CRUD Pattern: useQuery + useMutation + optimistic updates + custom hooks
Ably Realtime Integration: Client Singleton + Token Route + Auth
Lency Individual Letter SVGs (L, E, N, C, Y)
